spiced-pumpkin-3.$description: A rich, artisanal orange used for primary actions and highlights that need to feel energetic yet grounded.

creamy-beige-3.$description: A soft, sophisticated neutral ideal for large backgrounds or secondary text surfaces.

cranberry-red-3.$description: A deep, passionate red for accents that require a touch of elegance and tradition.

moss-green-3.$description: A natural, calming green that works perfectly for footers, borders, or botanical elements.

golden-yellow-3.$description: A warm, honey-like yellow used for subtle highlights and secondary buttons.

embers-glow-3.$description: A rich burnt sienna for primary buttons and brand marks.

mulled-wine-3.$description: A deep berry purple for high-contrast luxury accents.

roasted-bean-3.$description: A dark warm brown for grounding typography.

spiced-cider-3.$description: A muted dusty orange for secondary headings and accents.

woolen-oat-3.$description: A soft warm off-white for primary backgrounds.

heirloom-bark-3.$description: A deep charcoal brown for primary body copy.

honey-glow-3.$description: A rich golden amber for interactive highlights.

mossy-branch-3.$description: A dark olive green for grounding typography and botanical elements.

parchment-silk-3.$description: A warm off-white for primary backgrounds.

terracotta-soil-3.$description: A sun-baked clay for primary CTAs and headings.

roasted-umber-3.$description: Deep grounding brown used for primary brand elements, footers, and high-contrast text.

honeyed-amber-3.$description: A vibrant yet earthy yellow for call-to-action buttons, icons, and highlights.

spiced-chai-3.$description: A muted, warm terracotta/rose tone used for secondary cards and UI elements.

clotted-cream-3.$description: A soft, warm off-white used for backgrounds, headers, and light UI sections.

antique-parchment-3.$description: A slightly darker neutral for card backgrounds and borders to provide depth.

cream-silk-3.$description: Cream Silk: Light background base color. Soft, warm off-white for low-strain readability.

midnight-neon-3.$description: Midnight Neon: Dark background base color. Deep violet-blue for sophisticated depth.

electric-yellow-3.$description: Electric Yellow: Primary brand color. High energy and optimism for CTAs.

dragonfruit-pink-3.$description: Dragonfruit Pink: Secondary accent color. Bold contrast for high-priority elements.

lime-spark-3.$description: Lime Spark: Alt brand color. Refreshing balance for icons and success states.

playful-red-3.$description: Energetic accent used for primary Call-to-Action buttons and urgent alerts.

sunny-gold-3.$description: Used for highlights, star ratings, and seasonal badges.

warm-biscuit-3.$description: A soft, neutral light color designed for large background surfaces to reduce eye strain.

midnight-navy-3.$description: A deep, near-black blue for high-contrast text and structural navigation.

royal-purple-3.$description: Used for secondary buttons, interactive states, and luxury product accents.

onyx-night-3.$description: A deep, near-black used for primary typography, headers, and high-contrast UI elements to ensure readability against vibrant accents.

cotton-cloud-3.$description: A warm, soft off-white designed for large background areas, providing a friendly and less 'sterile' look than pure white.

electric-blue-3.$description: The main brand driver. Used for primary call-to-action buttons, shopping bags, and key brand icons to denote reliability and fun.

bubblegum-pink-3.$description: A vibrant accent color ideal for product packaging (like the box mockup), promotional banners, and highlights.

sunny-citrus-3.$description: Used for badges, 'New Arrival' tags, and illustrations to add a pop of warmth and visual variety.

creamy-bone-3.$description: A soft, sophisticated off-white used for primary backgrounds to reduce eye strain while maintaining a bright, airy feel.

sunny-yellow-3.$description: An optimistic accent color perfect for highlights, icons, and bringing a sense of 'joy' to the user interface.

cerulean-blue-3.$description: A trustworthy and calm blue used for secondary buttons, links, and illustrative elements.

forest-green-3.$description: The deep, grounding color used for text, dark-mode backgrounds, and primary navigation elements.

fiery-orange-3.$description: The primary call-to-action color, designed to grab attention and drive user conversion.

onyx-steel-3.$description: Deep near-black neutral for primary text and dark mode backgrounds.

frosted-zinc-3.$description: Cool-toned light grey for surfaces and UI dividers.

cobalt-graphite-3.$description: Muted blue-grey primary brand color for headers and buttons.

slag-grey-3.$description: Mid-tone neutral for secondary text and disabled states.

industrial-amber-3.$description: High-visibility safety amber for CTAs and key highlights.

concrete-grey-3.$description: A foundational neutral that mimics cured cement. Perfect for large background areas or secondary containers.

steel-blue-3.$description: A professional mid-tone representing high-grade machinery and diamond-tipped tools. Used for subheaders and icons.

asphalt-dark-3.$description: A deep, near-black blue for maximum contrast. Ideal for footers, primary text, and heavy branding elements.

deep-sea-blue-3.$description: An elegant, dark corporate blue that adds depth to the industrial aesthetic. Use for primary buttons or navigation.

warning-orange-3.$description: The energetic accent color. It signifies action, safety, and high-performance power. Use for CTAs and alerts.

carbon-shadow-3.$description: A deep, near-black neutral used for structural grounding, primary text, and heavy borders.

slate-foundry-3.$description: A cool, muted blue-grey that mimics treated metal. Use for secondary UI elements.

raw-steel-3.$description: The primary neutral. Represents unfinished concrete and brushed aluminum.

midnight-teal-3.$description: A sophisticated accent color for CTA buttons and core brand identity.

oxidized-copper-3.$description: A warm contrast color mimicking weathered copper or rust. Use for alerts.

charcoal-3.$description: Primary dark grounding color for text and deep UI regions.

steel-grey-3.$description: Neutral scale for secondary backgrounds, borders, and subtle structural elements.

industrial-blue-3.$description: The Structural Support primary brand color for navigation and primary containers.

rust-red-3.$description: High-contrast secondary color used for membership tiers and primary calls to action.

electric-cyan-3.$description: The Digital Energy accent for active states, icons, and vital Join Now buttons.

creme-brulee-3.$description: Warm off-white used for primary backgrounds and clean whitespace.

charcoal-truffle-3.$description: Deep, rich near-black with warm undertones for primary typography and footers.

dusty-rose-3.$description: Sophisticated, muted pink-red for secondary accents and soft borders.

gilded-saffron-3.$description: Muted, golden ochre for buttons, branding, and high-value highlights.

slate-blue-3.$description: Cool, desaturated blue used for cooling anchors and elegant UI dividers.

silk-creamsicle-3.$description: A delicate champagne off-white used for clean, elegant backgrounds and airy UI sections.

dusty-rose-petal-3.$description: A sophisticated, muted rose that serves as the primary brand color for buttons and call-to-actions.

burnished-gold-3.$description: A soft, metallic-inspired tan used for luxury accents, borders, and high-end iconography.

vintage-mauve-3.$description: A deeper, muted mauve that provides variety for secondary interactive elements and hover states.

velvet-charcoal-3.$description: A soft warm black used for body typography and high-contrast luxury dark-mode backgrounds.

charcoal-noir-3.$description: Deep grounded neutral for text and high contrast.

dusty-rose-3.$description: Primary brand color for buttons and highlights.

chambray-mist-3.$description: Secondary brand color for subtle UI.

camel-suede-3.$description: Accent color for details and tags.

dusty-rose-3.$description: A sophisticated, muted pink that adds a touch of warmth and femininity.

sage-leaf-3.$description: A grounding, organic green that represents nature, healing, and renewal.

obsidian-mist-3.$description: A deep, soft charcoal used for text, grounding elements, and luxury dark-mode backgrounds.
